title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 330.100 - Establishment of board — meetings
text:
330.100.  Establishment of board — meetings. — There is hereby created and established a "State Board of Podiatric Medicine" for the purpose of licensing all practitioners of podiatric medicine in this state, which board shall have such other powers and duties as are provided by this chapter.  The board shall meet annually and at such other times and places as a majority of the board shall designate.
(L. 1945 p. 635 § 1, A. 1949 H.B. 2070, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1995 S.B. 69, et al., A.L. 2005 H.B. 402 merged with S.B. 178)
